## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Exercised the change in the running app (or explained why that wasn't possible)
- [ ] No `.env` or secrets in the diff
- [ ] Migrations (if any) reviewed and committed
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes
